languages.text: This law enforcer makes an accusation. If the accused person proves guilty through their actions by the end of their turn, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Префект выносит цели обвинение. Если поведение цели в её ход соответствует обвинению, то в цель стреляет Пушка обвинения.

languages.text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.
languages.original_text: Этот служитель закона выдвигает обвинение. Если действия обвиняемого до конца его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} подтвердят его вину, Орудие правосудия подвергнет его {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Неизбежной каре{/g}.

traits.locale_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their turn through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Этот служитель закона выдвигает обвинение. Если действия обвиняемого до конца его хода подтвердят его вину, Орудие правосудия подвергнет его {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Неизбежной каре{/g}.
Этот служитель закона выдвигает обвинение. Если действия обвиняемого до конца его хода подтвердят его вину, Орудие правосудия подвергнет его {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Неизбежной каре{/g}.

languages.text: Der Gesetzesvollstrecker erhebt eine Anklage. Erweist sich die angeklagte Person durch ihre Aktionen am Ende ihres {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} als schuldig, fährt die Waffe der Gerechtigkeit mit {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Unausweichliche Vergeltung{/g} fort.
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Der Gesetzesvollstrecker erhebt eine Anklage. Erweist sich die angeklagte Person durch ihre Aktionen am Ende ihres {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} als schuldig, fährt die Waffe der Gerechtigkeit mit {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Unausweichliche Vergeltung{/g} fort.

languages.text: Le procureur met un individu en accusation. Si par ses actions, sa culpabilité est avérée à la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, le bras armé de la justice procède au {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Châtiment inéluctable{/g}.
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Le procureur met un individu en accusation. Si par ses actions, sa culpabilité est avérée à la fin de son tour, le bras armé de la justice procède au {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Châtiment inéluctable{/g}.

languages.text: 这位执法者对目标进行了指控。如果被指控的目标{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时未能完成要求，则会被宣判有罪，而正义武装将会对目标发动{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}审判将至{/g}。
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 这位执法者对目标进行了指控。如果被指控的目标回合结束时未能完成要求，则会被宣判有罪，而正义武装将会对目标发动{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}审判将至{/g}。
这位执法者对目标进行了指控。如果被指控的目标回合结束时未能完成要求，则会被宣判有罪，而正义武装将会对目标发动{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}审判将至{/g}。

languages.text: El representante de la ley lanza una acusación. Si la culpabilidad de la persona acusada queda demostrada para el final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el Arma de la Justicia desata su {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Castigo ineludible{/g}.
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Este representante de la ley lanza una acusación. Si la culpabilidad de la persona acusada queda demostrada para el final de su turno, el Arma de la Justicia desata su {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Castigo ineludible{/g}.

languages.text: 法の執行者は告発を行う。告発された人物がその行動を通じて{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}の終了時までに罪が証明された場合、正義の武器によって{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}不可避な報復{/g}が進められる。
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: この法の執行者は告発を行う。告発された人物がその行動を通じてターンの終了時までに罪が証明された場合、正義の武器によって{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}不可避な報復{/g}が進められる。
法の執行者は告発を行う。告発された人物がその行動を通じてターンの終了時までに罪が証明された場合、正義の武器によって{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}不可避な報復{/g}が進められる。

languages.text: Kanun uygulayıcısı bir suçlamada bulunur. Suçlanan kişi {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda eylemlerinden dolayı suçlu bulunursa Adalet Silahı, {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Kaçınılmaz Öç{/g} gerçekleştirir.
languages.original_text: The enforcer of the law makes an accusation. If the accused person is proven guilty by the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} through their actions, the Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Kanun uygulayıcısı bir suçlamada bulunur. Suçlanan kişi {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda eylemlerinden dolayı suçlu bulunursa Adalet Silahı, {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Kaçınılmaz Öç{/g} gerçekleştirir.
Bu kanun uygulayıcısı bir suçlamada bulunur. Suçlanan kişi turunun sonunda eylemlerinden dolayı suçlu bulunursa Adalet Silahı, {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Kaçınılmaz Öç{/g} gerçekleştirir.
